allies.rationale_text: Prioritization helps goal-setting convert one explicit outcome into concrete trade-offs, sequencing, and measurement discipline.
allies.source_quote: Most useful when effort is scattered and the team needs one explicit outcome to align trade-offs, sequencing, and measurement.

allies.rationale_text: Metacognitive-questioning helps goal-setting keep goals connected to deliberate planning rather than to unexamined aspiration.
allies.source_quote: Goal setting is deeply tied to metacognition (thinking about thinking).

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias turns goal-setting into direction defense by gathering evidence only to justify the existing target.
antagonists.source_quote: goal-setting conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when teams gather evidence only to confirm the existing direction rather than evaluate whether the goal remains valid.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Goal-setting conflicts with input-vs-output-goals when activity quotas replace outcome accountability.
structured_tensions.source_quote: goal-setting vs input-vs-output-goals: goal-setting conflicts with input-vs-output-goals (input vs output goals) when activity quotas replace outcome accountability.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Goal-setting conflicts with commitment-bias when stale goals persist after environmental change.
structured_tensions.source_quote: goal-setting vs commitment-bias: goal-setting conflicts with commitment-bias (commitment bias) when stale goals persist after environmental change.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Goal-setting conflicts with confirmation-bias when teams gather evidence only to confirm the existing direction rather than evaluate whether the goal remains valid.
structured_tensions.source_quote: goal-setting vs confirmation-bias: goal-setting conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when teams gather evidence only to confirm the existing direction rather than evaluate whether the goal remains valid.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on explicit tension blocks and concrete alignment logic, so the file preserves those and avoids broader speculative symmetry.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation expansion beyond the named output-accountability and stale-goal conflict surface.
open_questions: Design-thinking and Feynman-technique are source-real allies, but this pass kept the smaller relation surface closest to execution coordination.
